info.name: Quest VR Explorer (Sentis ONNX bundle)
info.description: Builds a deploy.zip ready for the Edge Impulse VR Explorer Quest app. Converts the trained TFLite into ONNX (via tflite2onnx) and bundles it with a metadata.json describing the DSP block, classes, and sensor — so the headset can load the model with Unity Sentis and apply matching client-side DSP.

parameters.name: Include EON-compiled model
parameters.help: Include the EON-compiled .h files alongside the ONNX. Optional; the Quest app uses the ONNX, but the EON output can be useful for native plugins.

parameters.name: Quantization
parameters.help: Which TFLite variant to convert. float32 matches Sentis's default precision.
